title: WebSocket issue prevents saving and enabling workflows
symptom: Users cannot save, enable, or test workflows after updating n8n. A WebSocket error message appears when attempting these actions.
root_cause: The WebSocket connection may not be properly configured in the reverse proxy settings, leading to failures in communication between the n8n server and the client interface.
fix_steps: Update the WebSocket settings as required
agent_instruction: Update the WebSocket settings in the caddy file and restart the n8n service.
